response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Resume shows roughly 11-13 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms, no advanced degree, and no evidence of cloud/AI strategy leadership or advising strategic customers at scale. Recent exposure to MCP and agentic tooling is promising but insufficient for a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Track record of founding open-source platforms, teaching workshops, and conference speaking
concerns: Falls short of 15 years and lacks Director-level IC or principal-level scope
No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
No evidence of cloud strategy advisory work with strategic customers or executive stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Insufficient seniority for Director-level IC scope
